name: Justin Matheson
subject: details for tomorrow’s debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Washingtonians for Bryant (R)
body:
| [ ](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/?e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate0816a&n=1)
---
Friend --

Tomorrow, Bill will get up on stage in Spokane and detail his vision for Washington in a debate against Jay Inslee. I hope you’ll tune in and watch with me.

I’m looking forward to a productive conversation about what has gone wrong over the past four years, and what Bill will do to turn things around for our state. No more “secret sauce” from Jay – Bill is a leader and he’ll take the action necessary to improve the quality of life for _all_ Washingtonians.

We can't let the status quo continue - not with our education system failing our kids, traffic ruining our days, and scandal after scandal unfolding without any real responsibility or action being taken by the Inslee Administration.

Hope you’ll join me and tune in at 4PM!

Here are the details for how to watch:

**In Spokane or Tri Cities? Watch on TV:**
* SWX Spokane 112 HD 306 SD
* SWX Tri-Cities 183

**Stream Online:**

* [KHQ.com](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fkhq.com%2F&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate0816a&n=2)
* [Spokesman.com](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fspokesman.com%2F&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate0816a&n=3)
* [KIRO7.com](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fkiro7.com%2F&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate0816a&n=4)

**Listen live on the radio:**
* KQNT will carry the gubernatorial debate ONLY at 4:00pm

Justin Matheson
Campaign Manager, Bill Bryant for Governor
(253) 220-5051

[**\- Contribute Today -**](billbryantforgovernor.com/support)

Paid for by Washingtonians for Bryant (R)

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you have any questions or comments, [click here](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/contact?e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate0816a&n=5) and let us know. We believe that email is one of the best ways to stay in touch, but you can [click here if you would like to unsubscribe](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/unsubscribe?e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate0816a&n=6) from these messages.

If you’re not interested in continuing to receive email updates, there are other ways to stay involved. You can follow our campaign on [Facebook](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbillbryantwashington&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate0816a&n=7) or [Twitter](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FBillBryantWA&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate0816a&n=8).

**Thank you so much for everything you’re doing to help make Washington State a better place to learn, to work, to play, and to live.**

Washingtonians for Bryant (R), P.O. Box 2121, Tacoma, WA 98401

[Privacy Policy](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/privacy_policy?e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate0816a&n=9)

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: re: regrets (UPDATE)
body:
It means a lot to Hillary | Peter --

I wanted to make sure you saw this note from Robby. We've made a ton of progress since he sent this out, but we’re still trailing our projection for the day. We're looking for 4 more donations from your area to help us reach our fundraising goal. **[I’m asking you to make one of them right now.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjYyNTg4MzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyNzg4ODk1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

I’m so proud that this campaign is built on the support of 2 million donors -- it means that when we put up the ad that wins us a point in Ohio or hire that field organizer who will register folks to vote in Florida, you’re a big part of it.

But it also means that if you don’t step up when we need you, we miss our goals -- and our chance to gain ground where we need it.

Our daily fundraising goals aren’t aspirational -- they’re the numbers we need to hit to be sure we're building a campaign that can win in November.

I’m only writing to you because I know that you’re a committed member of this team. That means a lot to Hillary. **But it’s not enough to cheer from the sidelines right now, Peter. We need you to chip in to help us hit today's goal -- when you do, we’ll send you a free sticker:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYyNTg4MzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyNzg4ODk1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks,

Dennis

Dennis Cheng
National Finance Director
Hillary for America

\-----Forwarded message-----
From: HillaryClinton.com
Subject: regrets Peter --

I know how invested you are in this campaign, so I wanted to make sure you heard from me about our progress for the month.

At a time when we should be crushing the other side in fundraising -- and building the strongest voter outreach operation we can -- our fundraising has actually been falling just a little bit short of our projections, day-by-day.

**[So here I am in your inbox -- asking for you to stand with us again right now. Will you chip in $1?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjYyNTg4MzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyNzg4ODk1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

On a different kind of campaign, in another election, I might not need to send this email. But everything we've built up to this point has come with the support of 2 million people like you. You're literally the source of most of the money this campaign raises.

And this year, I can’t even tell you how important it is that we not just win this thing, but win by a huge margin. Anything less will leave the door open for Trump to claim that we “rigged” this election.

Don’t look back at this moment with regret, Peter. **Chip in $1 right now to make 100% sure we see the last of Trump on November 8th:**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYyNTg4MzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyNzg4ODk1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 and be one of the more than 2 million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYyNTg4MzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyNzg4ODk1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

**** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjYyNTg4MzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyNzg4ODk1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjYyNTg4MzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyNzg4ODk1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Opening this email on your iPhone? [Click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjYyNTg4MzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyNzg4ODk1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to get our Hillary 2016 mobile app now. Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjYyNTg4MzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyNzg4ODk1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjYyNTg4MzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyNzg4ODk1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjYyNTg4MzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyNzg4ODk1S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYyNTg4MzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyNzg4ODk1S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjYyNTg4MzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyNzg4ODk1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjYyNTg4MzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyNzg4ODk1S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjYyNTg4MzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyNzg4ODk1S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjYyNTg4MzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyNzg4ODk1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: I need you to show it, Peter
body:
We need to win decisively | Peter --

It's not enough just to beat Donald Trump.

I want this election to be a definitive statement: that America rejects not just Donald Trump, but the divisive politics of anger and fear that he peddles. That you can't win the presidency in this country acting like a schoolyard bully.

Trump’s supporters stepped up with more than $80 million in July, and we believe that amount could be even bigger in August. Meanwhile, our own fundraising this week has slowed down, and we’ve missed some critical goals.

We don’t want to have to play catch-up in the all-important weeks leading up to the election. Let's not leave him any opening through which he can take the lead. **[Can you chip in right now to keep us on pace to match or exceed Trump’s fundraising (and we’ll send you a free sticker, too)?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjYyNTg5MTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyNzkxMjYzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

** The world is watching very carefully for what this team will do between now and November 8th. I want us to say in no uncertain terms that we will not stand for Trump's perversion of American values or for the hateful rhetoric he spews in attempting to turn us against one another.

Our nation was founded on the ideals of freedom and equality, and we have been a symbol of those values for more than two centuries. But if we head into this final phase of the election with Trump's campaign on the same footing as our own -- if we permit him to outraise us -- this will indeed be a very close election. And we could lose.

I know you don’t want that to happen. Today, I need you to show it.

**Can you help? Your donation today is about much more than money -- it’s your commitment to our country and everything that already makes us so great:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYyNTg5MTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyNzkxMjYzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Hillary

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 and be one of the more than 2 million grassroots donors standing with her:**

If Senate Democrats gain the majority, I know we'll have more spending, higher taxes on the middle-class, stagnant job growth, see restrictions on our religious and second amendment rights, and - _most importantly_ \- less security for Americans.

Can you imagine if Hillary Clinton wins the White House AND Senate Democrats gain the majority? Friend, that's not an America I would like to see. Thanks,

Marco Rubio

name: Bullock HQ
subject: Criticizing seniors who retire? We think no.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

This past weekend, we celebrated the 81st anniversary of Social Security. But Greg Gianforte has a much different view. Remember, he actually criticized seniors for retiring, saying:

_" How old was Noah when he built the ark? 600. He wasn't like, cashing Social Security checks, he wasn't hanging out, he was working. So, I think we have an obligation to work.... but the concept of retirement is not Biblical."_ \-- Greg Gianforte

What Mr. Gianforte doesn't seem to understand is that our seniors paid into the system and earned their Social Security after a lifetime of hard work.

**[Send him a message and ask him to stop disparaging Montanans who deserve a secure retirement. And if you want, leave a comment about how you or a loved one earned Social Security benefits.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=3gTXCWLMKwSrzzR8l1rfUS2ZfA2ASdG1)**

Thanks,
Bullock HQ

body:
Update on our numbers: | Hey, Peter -- update for you: Since we sent this email yesterday, this team has stepped up in a big way and proven you’ll come through when it matters.

We’ve made up 68 percent of our shortfall for this week -- but we still need 17 more donations from your area to hit our goal. **Can you help right now? (You’ll get a free sticker when you do!)** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYyNjQwNjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyODg5MjE2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you -- you’re the best!

Dennis

Dennis Cheng
National Finance Director
Hillary for America

\-----Forwarded message-----
From: HillaryClinton.com
Subject: regrets Peter --

I know how invested you are in this campaign, so I wanted to make sure you heard from me about our progress for the month.

At a time when we should be crushing the other side in fundraising -- and building the strongest voter outreach operation we can -- our fundraising has actually been falling just a little bit short of our projections, day-by-day.

**[So here I am in your inbox -- asking for you to stand with us again right now. Will you chip in $1?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjYyNjQwNjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyODg5MjE2S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

On a different kind of campaign, in another election, I might not need to send this email. But everything we've built up to this point has come with the support of 2 million people like you. You're literally the source of most of the money this campaign raises.

And this year, I can’t even tell you how important it is that we not just win this thing, but win by a huge margin. Anything less will leave the door open for Trump to claim that we “rigged” this election.

Don’t look back at this moment with regret, Peter. **Chip in $1 right now to make 100% sure we see the last of Trump on November 8th:**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYyNjQwNjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyODg5MjE2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 and be one of the more than 2 million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjYyNjQwNjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyODg5MjE2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

**** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---

Friends,

Donald Trump has said a lot of infuriating, despicable things in this campaign -- but this one strikes close to home:

**Trump said Harrisburg "looked like a war zone"
as he flew above it on his way out of town**
- _Politico, August 2_
It's hard to imagine anything more insulting. The people of Harrisburg are proud of the homes and the community they've built, and nobody should have to remind Donald Trump that our state's capital city is anything but a war zone.

Pat Toomey **_still_** supports Donald Trump. He **_still_** stands behind a man who bullies women, minorities, disabled people, and even Gold Star families. Just this week, Pat Toomey said, "Personally, I'm still hoping that Donald Trump can become a candidate that I can enthusiastically support."

---
Friend --

I want to make sure you saw this message from my campaign manager. **I’ll be debating Jay Inslee in Spokane in just a few hours, and I’d love it if you could tune in at 4PM today to watch.**

I’m looking forward to a productive and substantive conversation about the issues faced by Washingtonians – but Jay Inslee is also going to have to answer for his inability to lead his administration through its failures and scandals.

You and I both know it’s time for new leadership, and I’m looking forward to getting that message out more and more between now and November.

Bill \---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Justin Matheson
Date: Tue, Aug 16, 2016 at 5:02 PM
Subject: big debate tomorrow
To: Supporters
Friend --

Tomorrow, Bill will get up on stage in Spokane and detail his vision for Washington in a debate against Jay Inslee. I hope you’ll tune in and watch with me.

I’m looking forward to a productive conversation about what has gone wrong over the past four years, and what Bill will do to turn things around for our state. No more “secret sauce” from Jay – Bill is a leader and he’ll take the action necessary to improve the quality of life for _all_ Washingtonians.

We can't let the status quo continue - not with our education system failing our kids, traffic ruining our days, and scandal after scandal unfolding without any real responsibility or action being taken by the Inslee Administration.

Hope you’ll join me and tune in at 4PM!

Here are the details for how to watch:

**In Spokane or Tri Cities? Watch on TV:**
* SWX Spokane 112 HD 306 SD
* SWX Tri-Cities 183

**Stream Online:**

* [KHQ.com](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fkhq.com%2F&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debatefwd0817a&n=2)
* [Spokesman.com](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fspokesman.com%2F&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debatefwd0817a&n=3)
* [KIRO7.com](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fkiro7.com%2F&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debatefwd0817a&n=4)

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Whenever you hear about a right-wing conspiracy theory...
body:
Donald Trump just hired Breitbart's executive director to be his new campaign CEO. | Peter --

Whenever you hear about a right-wing conspiracy theory somehow making its way into the mainstream of political dialogue, there's a good chance that _Breitbart News_ had something to do with it.

Never heard of _Breitbart News_? It's a fringe website where there's no opinion too ugly, too divisive, or too outright crazy to be worth breathless promotion.

The one about President Obama being a secret Muslim born in Kenya? _Breitbart_ was all over that "story."

Or maybe you heard about the time they attacked an opponent -- a conservative Republican, no less -- by calling him a "renegade Jew."

Why does this matter?

Donald Trump just hired _Breitbart's_ executive director to be his new campaign CEO.

Now, we've had a conservative media in this country for a while. I don't always like what they have to say, but I respect their role and their right to exist.

_Breitbart_ is something different. They make Fox News look like a Democratic Party pamphlet. They're a different breed altogether -- not just conservative but radical, bigoted, anti-Muslim, anti-Semitic conspiracy peddlers who never have been and never should be anywhere near the levers of power in this country.

But Donald Trump just gave them a broad new mandate to shape his campaign, his message, the future of the Republican Party, and quite possibly the country.

It goes without saying that we have to beat these people. But I want to beat them so decisively that their kind never rises again.

Doing that is going to take hard work, moral clarity, unshakeable determination, and enough resources to make sure that every last voter in America hears from us every single day about the choice in this election.

**We'll never face a challenge more important than this. Please, chip in $1 to stand on the right side of history and help us send Donald Trump and Steve Bannon back to the fringes where they belong:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYyNjkxMjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyOTQ0NzY5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Christina

clean_body: Donald Trump just hired Breitbart's executive director to be his new campaign CEO. | Peter -- Whenever you hear about a right-wing conspiracy theory somehow making its way into the mainstream of political dialogue, there's a good chance that Breitbart News had something to do with it. Never heard of Breitbart News? It's a fringe website where there's no opinion too ugly, too divisive, or too outright crazy to be worth breathless promotion. The one about President Obama being a secret Muslim born in Kenya? Breitbart was all over that "story." Or maybe you heard about the time they attacked an opponent -- a conservative Republican, no less -- by calling him a "renegade Jew." Why does this matter? Donald Trump just hired Breitbart's executive director to be his new campaign CEO. Now, we've had a conservative media in this country for a while. I don't always like what they have to say, but I respect their role and their right to exist. Breitbart is something different. They make Fox News look like a Democratic Party pamphlet. They're a different breed altogether -- not just conservative but radical, bigoted, anti-Muslim, anti-Semitic conspiracy peddlers who never have been and never should be anywhere near the levers of power in this country. But Donald Trump just gave them a broad new mandate to shape his campaign, his message, the future of the Republican Party, and quite possibly the country. It goes without saying that we have to beat these people. But I want to beat them so decisively that their kind never rises again. Doing that is going to take hard work, moral clarity, unshakeable determination, and enough resources to make sure that every last voter in America hears from us every single day about the choice in this election. We'll never face a challenge more important than this.
